rag_rules: Insert generated AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Ensure that assumptions and guarantees are placed in valid scopes according to the AADL model structure
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless they are represented through valid variables or outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope; otherwise omit the unsafe clause
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons or 0/1 equality
Do not place assumptions and guarantees in invalid scopes according to the AADL model structure
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
